body:
The implementation requires some refactoring of how boundary conditions are regularized to support the fact that `CombinationCondition` has two properties, rather than one as holds for all other conditions.

See #4490 for details about how the properties of `CombinationCondition` are defined.

Partially overlaps with #4722, but I can deal with conflicts as needed.

Closes #4490.

cc @joernc @shriyafruitwala
title: Implement MixedBoundaryCondition (aka RobinBoundaryCondition)

body: `barrier!` does not mutate the input so it should be `barrier`, and `global_barrier` should not accept a communicator as the `global_` qualifier implies that the barrier operates on the whole MPI processor grid.

labels.description: Our plan for total cluster domination
labels.name: distributed 🕸️

title: Some quality of life changes to distributed functions
